summary: This is a brief announcement post inviting readers to join the Climate Convergence march in New York City. O'Neil promotes the event as a way to raise awareness about climate change and mentions that her Alternative Banking group will be participating. The post provides logistical details for meeting up at the Natural History Museum.
key_points: Climate Convergence march scheduled for Sunday to raise climate change awareness
Alternative Banking group participating as an organization
Meeting point at 79th and Central Park West at 11am
money_quotes: This Sunday there'll be a huge march to raise awareness about climate change.
key_insight: This is a logistical announcement rather than an analytical post, showing O'Neil's activism connecting financial reform advocacy with climate action.
